case_title: 333 FREMONT VENTURE, LLC VS. LUMI WORLDWIDE, INC. ET AL

docket_entries.description: REMARK: FILE IS DESTROYED PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 68153. ORDER SIGNED AND FILED ON JAN-29-2025.
STIPULATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF 333 FREMONT VENTURE, LLC ALSO FILED BY DEFENDANT LUMI WORLDWIDE, INC.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF 333 FREMONT VENTURE, LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LUMI WORLDWIDE, INC. THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 333 FREMONT STREET, UNIT #706, SAN FRANCISCO, CA $16,838.33 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $16,838.33, SEE SCANNED DOC
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF 333 FREMONT VENTURE, LLC AS TO DEFENDANT LUMI WORLDWIDE, INC. DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
ORDER GRANTING EX PARTE REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT
EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO BREACH OF STIPULATION FILED BY PLAINTIFF 333 FREMONT VENTURE, LLC
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF ORDER/NOTICE OF RULING FILED GRANTING EX PARTE REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF 333 FREMONT VENTURE, LLC
